text:
Name

 CCN 
 CMS Certification Number (Facility Provider Number) 

 PRVDR_STATE 
 Provider State 

 FAC_TIER 
 Tier 1: 25+ AHCAH Patients; Tier 2: <= 24 AHCAH Patients 

 FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT 
 Facility Data Submission Date 

 DISCHARGES 
 Count of AHCAH Discharges During the Data Submission Period 

 MORTALITIES 
 Count of AHCAH Mortalities During the Data Submission Period 

 ESCALATIONS 
 Count of AHCAH Patients Transferred Back to Inpatient Facility During the Data Submission Period
